antipattern.symptom: Audit report >120 days old still cited as current.
antipattern.root-cause: Quarterly refresh missed; no calendar reminder.
antipattern.fix: Add cron / calendar reminder; on read, flag any audit >120 days as stale and refuse to derive decisions from it.

antipattern.symptom: Remediation diff replaces the entire config file with a 'recommended' one, wiping local exclusions.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent picks the easiest path: whole-file write rather than line-level diff.
antipattern.fix: Reject the PR. Re-draft with `diff` format only; preserve existing customisations.

antipattern.symptom: Audit recommends every new strict flag without checking project context (e.g. exactOptionalPropertyTypes in a codebase with 500 callsites).
antipattern.root-cause: Audit driver applies the universal recommendation list without measuring blast radius.
antipattern.fix: Per-flag cost estimate: count of files affected; defer flags with cost above the owner-set ceiling.
